title: Build payment entry app with dynamic form and Excel export

requirements.text: Create a payment entry form with Customer Invoice Number (required text field) and Payment Mode dropdown (required, options: NEFT, Cheque)
acceptanceCriteria: Invoice Number field accepts text input and is marked as required
Payment Mode dropdown displays exactly two options: NEFT and Cheque
Both fields are always visible on the form

requirements.text: When Payment Mode is set to NEFT, dynamically show Transaction ID/UTR Number (required text field), Amount (required number field), and Date of Payment (required date picker). Hide all Cheque-specific fields.
acceptanceCriteria: NEFT fields appear only when NEFT is selected
All three NEFT fields are marked as required
Cheque fields are hidden when NEFT mode is active
Fields update immediately when Payment Mode changes

requirements.text: When Payment Mode is set to Cheque, dynamically show Bank Name (required text field), Cheque Number (required text field), Cheque Amount (required number field), and Cheque Date (required date picker). Hide all NEFT-specific fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Cheque fields appear only when Cheque is selected
All four Cheque fields are marked as required
NEFT fields are hidden when Cheque mode is active
Fields update immediately when Payment Mode changes

requirements.text: Store all payment entry data in the backend with fields: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID (NEFT only), NEFT Amount (NEFT only), NEFT Date (NEFT only), Bank Name (Cheque only), Cheque Number (Cheque only), Cheque Amount (Cheque only), Cheque Date (Cheque only)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores payment records with all specified fields
Conditional fields store null/empty when not applicable to payment mode
Data persists between page reloads
Records can be retrieved for display and export

requirements.text: On Submit button click, save the payment entry to the backend and automatically clear all form fields to their default state
acceptanceCriteria: Submit saves complete payment record to backend
Form clears immediately after successful save
Invoice Number resets to empty
Payment Mode resets to default/unselected state
All conditional fields clear and hide appropriately

requirements.text: Create a Report section that displays all saved payment records in a table with columns: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID/UTR, NEFT Amount, NEFT Date, Bank Name, Cheque Number, Cheque Amount, Cheque Date
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all saved payment entries
All nine columns are visible in the table
Empty cells display for fields not applicable to payment mode
Table updates when new entries are submitted

requirements.text: Add a Download Excel button in the Report section that exports all payment records to an Excel file with columns: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID/UTR, NEFT Amount, NEFT Date, Bank Name, Cheque Number, Cheque Amount, Cheque Date
acceptanceCriteria: Download Excel button is visible in Report section
Clicking button generates and downloads Excel file
Excel file contains all nine specified columns
Excel includes all saved payment records
Empty cells for fields not applicable to payment mode

requirements.text: Implement mobile-first responsive layout with clean white and light grey theme, large input fields optimized for touch, minimal UI with no animations, and lightweight design for fast loading on low-end Android phones
acceptanceCriteria: Layout is fully responsive and mobile-optimized
Color scheme uses white and light grey
Input fields are large enough for easy mobile typing
No animations or transitions
Page loads quickly with minimal resources
UI is clean and uncluttered

constraints: Must be lightweight and optimized for low-end Android phones
Must use only the platform's supported stack (React, Motoko backend)
No animations or heavy visual effects
nonGoals: Payment processing or integration with payment gateways
Editing or deleting existing payment records
